steps.title: Use the trend shape
steps.content: The plotted data increase at a roughly steady rate, so a linear model is more appropriate than an exponential model. That eliminates choices C and D.

steps.title: Use the trend direction
steps.content: Because $y$ increases as $x$ increases, the slope must be positive. Choice B has slope $-1.2$, so it decreases instead.

steps.title: Choose the linear model
steps.content:
The remaining model has a positive linear trend.
$$y=-694+1.2x$$
The answer is A.
